package models

import (
	"gorm.io/gorm"
)

// Anti-pattern: AfterSave hook calls into a higher-layer service (NotificationService)
// and a repository (AuditRepository), creating a circular dependency from the
// models layer up to service/repository layers.

var notificationService NotificationService
var auditRepository AuditRepository

type NotificationService interface {
	Notify(userID uint, message string) error
}

type AuditRepository interface {
	LogAction(entity string, action string) error
}

type Order struct {
	ID     uint    `gorm:"primaryKey"`
	UserID uint    `gorm:"column:user_id"`
	Status string  `gorm:"column:status"`
	Total  float64 `gorm:"column:total"`
}

func (o *Order) AfterSave(tx *gorm.DB) error {
	notificationService.Notify(o.UserID, "Your order has been updated")
	auditRepository.LogAction("order", "saved")
	return nil
}
